# Chase Sapphire Preferred — First-Year Value

## 💳 Spend Profile

Using default moderate-spender profile:

1. Dining — $500/mo ($6,000/yr)
2. Travel — $200/mo ($2,400/yr)
3. Streaming — $100/mo ($1,200/yr)
4. Online grocery — $200/mo ($2,400/yr)
5. Other — $2,000/mo ($24,000/yr)

Total annual spend: $36,000

## 🎁 Welcome Bonus

- Example bonus worth ~$750 at 1 cpp (after meeting spend requirement)
- Status: confirmed

## 📈 Annual Earn

1. Dining — $6,000 × 3x = 18,000 pts
2. Travel — $2,400 × 2x = 4,800 pts
3. Streaming — $1,200 × 3x = 3,600 pts
4. Online grocery — $2,400 × 3x = 7,200 pts
5. Other — $24,000 × 1x = 24,000 pts

Total earn: 57,600 pts (~$576 at 1 cpp, ~$720 at 1.25 cpp via portal)

## 🏷️ Credits

- $50 hotel credit (annual)

## 💰 Net First-Year Value

| Component | Value |
|---|---|
| Welcome bonus | +$750 |
| Annual earn (1.25 cpp) | +$720 |
| Credits | +$50 |
| Annual fee | -$95 |
| **Net first-year value** | **~$1,425** |

Point valuation assumes 1.25 cpp (Chase Travel portal rate). Transfer redemptions can yield higher.

## 📋 Confidence Notes

- Fixture only. Not live card data.
- Point valuation at 1.25 cpp assumes Chase Travel portal; actual value varies by redemption method.
